column1: # HQC shim parameters. Columns: file, name, pk, sk, ct, ss, iters, variant
# variant: source/include subdir name in the upstream tree (hqc-1 / hqc-3 / hqc-5).
# Sizes from src/common/<variant>/api.h (latest HQC reference at
# https://gitlab.com/pqc-hqc/hqc). Built with the AVX2 implementation
# (HQC_ARCH=x86_64, avx256) — x86-64 only. HQC's reference exposes BARE,
# non-namespaced crypto_kem_* symbols and requires prng_init() before keygen;
# isolation via per-variant .so + dlopen(RTLD_LOCAL) keeps the bare symbols
